title: ChangeEvent
description: Records a change to a regulation, standard, ontology object, framework module, or downstream artefact. Drives the regulatory-change-monitoring layer the audit identified as a core value proposition — when a Authority publishes an amendment, every dependent obligation/control/evidence-rule gets a ChangeEvent so consumers can re-assess impact.

change_event_id.description: Stable identifier. Convention CE-YYYY-NNNN (year-monotonic per source).

kind.description: What KIND of change this event records.

subject_id.description: Identifier of the changed subject. Domain depends on subject_type — e.g. for framework: 'EU_AI_ACT'; for control: 'CTRL-IAM-ACCESS-REVIEW-001'.

old_version.description: Version the subject moved from. Use 'n/a' for new publications.

summary.description: One-paragraph human description of what changed and why it matters.

delta_refs.description: Specific clause/control/section identifiers that changed (subset of the subject).

downstream_impact.description: Downstream artefacts that should be re-assessed. Drives an inbox-style workflow for compliance teams.

effective_at.description: When the change is in legal/operational force.

published_at.description: When the change was officially published by the authority.

authority_id.description: Authority that published the change. E.g. 'eu-ec' for European Commission, 'iso-iec' for ISO/IEC, 'aicpa' for AICPA.

citation.description: Free-form citation string for audit packs.

supersedes.description: Other ChangeEvents this one supersedes (chain of amendments).
